specific_question: As of October 5, 2025, how many robotic arms are actively deployed in Elexion Automotive’s assembly facilities across North America?
answer: As of October 5, 2025, factory records show Elexion Automotive currently operates 2,850 robotic arms across its North American assembly facilities.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
